BONUS - niche Selection 4-Part Action Guide
Identifying your niche
MONEY MAKERS
Some markets are more profitable than others and if you can find a passion or follow the
profit in one of the big four, your chances for success are much greater. As you follow the
money, keep the big four markets in mind…
The big four markets:
• 	Making money (business, investment, savings, personal finance, stock
market, etc.)
• 	Relationships (marriage, dating, parenting, etc.)
• 	Health (weight loss, herbal medicines, fitness, etc.)
• 	Hobbies (horse ballet, golf, scuba diving, planes, etc.)
1. Keep your eyes and ears open for people that are having a lot of success and
find a way to improve upon their product or service or use the same techniques in
maybe even a different market. Use the space below to brainstorm ideas:

markets and sort by gravity. (If something has a high gravity then it’s selling well and

BONUS - niche Selection 4-Part Action Guide
Identifying your niche
TESTING YOUR IDEA
Once you’ve narrowed down your niche, research and test your idea so you can be sure
you’re only creating and selling what the market wants and not what you think they want.
Use the following checklist to guide you in your research and document your results…
¨ Google your niche
¨ Are people selling in these markets?
¨ Is there a trade association for that market?
¨ Look at popular magazines to get ideas
¨ Go to amazon.com and search for hot markets
¨ Join an affiliate program and observe
¨ Create a list of possible offers you could make and analyze in terms of…
o 	Demand
§ 	Search volume (likes at least 100k searches for all main keywords)
§ 	Is there any competition?
§ 	Adwords – are people paying for advertisements?
§ 	Is there a high “Cost per click” (CPC – 4-5$ per click is awesome)?
§ 	Are the prospects proven online buyers?
o 	Market quality
o 	Speed to market – does your idea have a short of long idea to first-sale
timeframe?
¨ Write the sales letter, even better, a squeeze page before the product even exists
and send traffic to it…
o 	PPC traffic is quickest
o 	Look for good conversions (-20%)
Once you’ve found your idea/niche, start building your list and building a relationship
with your list. To help you understand list building strategies – check out the
Launching Your List Bonus Course (Bonus tab 3).
www.getwsodo.com	www.getwsodo.com
